templates.summary: Create an associative polar array (ARRAYPOLAR) from the drawing's last-created entity, using explicit center, item count, angle, and rotate prompts.

center_x.description: Center point X coordinate for the polar array.

center_y.description: Center point Y coordinate for the polar array.

center_z.description: Center point Z coordinate for the polar array.

item_count.description: Total number of items in the polar array, including the source object.

angle_to_fill.description: Angle to fill for the polar array, in degrees.

rotate_items.description: Whether copied items rotate as they are created.
